dataFlows.transformKql:
source
| where clz_dir == "linux"
| extend TimeGenerated = datetime(1970-01-01) + _time * 1sec
| extend SyslogMessage = _raw
| extend HostName = host
| extend Computer = host
| extend SourceSystem = "SAPLogServ"
| extend Facility = case(clz_subdir == "cron", "cron", clz_subdir == "slapd", "daemon", clz_subdir == "sudolog", "authpriv", "daemon")
| extend SeverityLevel = "info"
| extend ProcessName = clz_subdir
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, HostName, SourceSystem, Facility, SeverityLevel, SyslogMessage, ProcessName

source
| where clz_dir == "windows"
| extend TimeGenerated = datetime(1970-01-01) + _time * 1sec
| extend Channel = case(clz_subdir has "Application", "Application", clz_subdir has "System", "System", clz_subdir has "Security", "Security", "Application")
| extend Computer = host
| extend RawEventData = _raw
| extend Provider = ""
| extend EventID = toint(extract(@"EventID[>:\s]+(\d+)", 1, _raw))
| project TimeGenerated, Channel, Computer, RawEventData, Provider, EventID

source
| where clz_dir == "dns"
| extend TimeGenerated = datetime(1970-01-01) + _time * 1sec
| extend EventType = "Query"
| extend EventProduct = "SAP LogServ DNS"
| extend EventVendor = "SAP"
| extend EventSchema = "Dns"
| extend EventSchemaVersion = "0.1.7"
| extend EventCount = toint(1)
| extend EventResult = "NA"
| extend Dvc = host
| extend DnsQuery = extract(@"query:\s+(\S+)", 1, _raw)
| extend DnsResponseCode = extract(@"status:\s+(\w+)", 1, _raw)
| project TimeGenerated, EventType, EventProduct, EventVendor, EventSchema, EventSchemaVersion, EventCount, EventResult, Dvc, DnsQuery, DnsResponseCode

source
| where clz_dir in ("network", "firewall", "proxy")
| extend TimeGenerated = datetime(1970-01-01) + _time * 1sec
| extend EventType = "NetworkSession"
| extend EventProduct = "SAP LogServ Network"
| extend EventVendor = "SAP"
| extend EventSchema = "NetworkSession"
| extend EventSchemaVersion = "0.2.7"
| extend EventCount = toint(1)
| extend EventResult = "NA"
| extend Dvc = host
| extend SrcIpAddr = extract(@"src[=:\s]+(\d+\.\d+\.\d+\.\d+)", 1, _raw)
| extend DstIpAddr = extract(@"dst[=:\s]+(\d+\.\d+\.\d+\.\d+)", 1, _raw)
| project TimeGenerated, EventType, EventProduct, EventVendor, EventSchema, EventSchemaVersion, EventCount, EventResult, Dvc, SrcIpAddr, DstIpAddr

source
| where clz_dir == "webdispatcher" and clz_subdir == "accesslog"
| extend TimeGenerated = datetime(1970-01-01) + _time * 1sec
| extend EventType = "WebSession"
| extend EventProduct = "SAP Web Dispatcher"
| extend EventVendor = "SAP"
| extend EventSchema = "WebSession"
| extend EventSchemaVersion = "0.2.7"
| extend EventCount = toint(1)
| extend Url = extract(@"(?:GET|POST|PUT|DELETE|PATCH|HEAD|OPTIONS)\s+(\S+)", 1, _raw)
| extend HttpStatusCode = extract(@"\s(\d{3})\s", 1, _raw)
| extend SrcIpAddr = extract(@"^(\d+\.\d+\.\d+\.\d+)", 1, _raw)
| extend _code = toint(HttpStatusCode)
| extend EventResult = case(_code >= 200 and _code <= 399, "Success", _code >= 400 and _code <= 599, "Failure", "NA")
| extend Dvc = host
| project TimeGenerated, EventType, EventProduct, EventVendor, EventSchema, EventSchemaVersion, EventCount, EventResult, Url, HttpStatusCode, SrcIpAddr, Dvc

source
| where isempty(clz_dir) or (clz_dir !in ("linux", "windows", "dns", "network", "firewall", "proxy") and not (clz_dir == "webdispatcher" and clz_subdir == "accesslog"))
| extend TimeGenerated = datetime(1970-01-01) + _time * 1sec
| extend Raw = _raw
| extend UnixTimestamp = _time
| project-away _raw, _time
